content_body:
Knight Family: 

What a wonderful home. This is more than a cabin! It is a well-appointed respite. I recently had a stroke and needed a few days to enjoy and relax. Everything was better than advertised. I am looking forward to returning with my family or a couple of friends wiht my wife. 

Let all that is within me

Let quarrels cease

Let His Mercies be new every morning. 

Many Blessings to all who stay here. 

-David

P.S. I have already sent links to five friends!
title: Well-Appointed Respite!
